info.title: The Selling Partner API for Amazon Seller Wallet Open Banking API
info.description: The Selling Partner API for Seller Wallet (Seller Wallet API) provides financial information that is relevant to a seller's Seller Wallet account. You can obtain financial events, balances, and transfer schedules for Seller Wallet accounts. You can also schedule and initiate transactions.

tags.name: Accounts
tags.description: Everything about Amazon Seller Wallet customer accounts

tags.name: Transfer Preview
tags.description: Access to all transfers with fees and the final amount with FX details in Amazon Seller Wallet

tags.name: Transactions
tags.description: Access to all transactions in Amazon Seller Wallet account

tags.name: Transfer Schedule
tags.description: Access to all transfer schedules in Amazon Seller Wallet account

post.summary: Create a transfer schedule request from Amazon Seller Wallet account to another customer-provided account
post.description: Create a transfer schedule request from a Seller Wallet account to another customer-provided account.

parameters.name: destAccountDigitalSignature
parameters.description: Digital signature for the destination bank account details.

parameters.name: amountDigitalSignature
parameters.description: Digital signature for the source currency transaction amount.

parameters.name: marketplaceId
parameters.description: The marketplace for which items are returned. The marketplace ID is the globally unique identifier of a marketplace. To find the ID for your marketplace, refer to [Marketplace IDs](../../offline-docs/marketplace-ids.md).

x-amzn-RateLimit-Limit.description: Your rate limit (requests per second) for this operation.

400.description: Request has missing or invalid parameters and cannot be parsed.

x-amzn-RateLimit-Limit.description: Your rate limit (requests per second) for this operation.

403.description: Indicates that access to the resource is forbidden. Possible reasons include Access Denied, Unauthorized, Expired Token, or Invalid Signature.

errors.details: NCA Status for the certificate is invalid

404.description: The resource specified does not exist.

errors.details: Account doesn't exists for invalid SourceAccountId

x-amzn-RateLimit-Limit.description: Your rate limit (requests per second) for this operation.

errors.details: Server did not respond in time

409.description: Transfer schedule already exists for same source and destination account combination.

errors.details: Transfer schedule already exists for same source and destination account combination.

413.description: The request size exceeded the maximum accepted size.

415.description: The request payload is in an unsupported format.

429.description: The frequency of requests was greater than allowed.

500.description: An unexpected condition occurred that prevented the server from fulfilling the request.

503.description: Temporary overloading or maintenance of the server.

BigDecimal.description: A decimal number, such as an amount or FX rate.

x-docgen-enum-table-extension.description: Money is deposited into the Seller Wallet account.
Money is taken out of the Seller Wallet account.

TransferScheduleFailures.description: The time of and reason for the transfer schedule failure.

transferScheduleFailureReason.description: The reason listed for the failure of the transfer schedule.

TransactionInstrumentDetails.description: Details of the destination bank account in the transaction request.

bankAccount.description: Details of the destination bank account.

bankAccountNumber.description:
The bank account number of the destination payment method.

**Note:** This field is encrypted before Amazon receives it, so should not be used to generate `destAccountDigitalSignature`, and should not be included in the request signature.

accountHolderName.description:
The bank account holder's name (expected to be an Amazon customer).

**Note:** This field is encrypted before Amazon receives it, so should not be used to generate `destAccountDigitalSignature`, and should not be included in the request signature.

scheduleExpressionType.description: The type of the scheduled transfer.

recurringFrequency.description: How often the scheduled transfer happens. This field is required if `scheduleExpressionType` is `RECURRING`; otherwise it should be empty.

TransactionAccount.description: Details of the bank account involved in the transaction.

accountId.description: The unique identifier provided by Amazon to identify the account.

bankAccountNumberFormat.description: The format for the bank account number.

bankAccountNumberTail.description: The last three digits of the bank account number.

bankAccountCountryCode.description: The two-digit country code, in ISO 3166 format. This field is optional for `transactionSourceAccount`, but is mandatory for `transactionDestinationAccount`.

bankAccountCurrency.description: The currency code in ISO 4217 format.

RecurringFrequency.description: The frequency at which the transaction is repeated.

x-docgen-enum-table-extension.description: The transfer repeats every day.
The transfer will repeat every week.
The transfer will repeat every two weeks.
The transfer will repeat every month.

BankAccount.description: Details of an Amazon Seller Wallet bank account. This account is used to hold the money that a Seller Wallet customer earns by selling items.

accountId.description: The unique bank account identifier provided by Amazon. To initiate a `SELF` transaction with Seller Wallet, you must choose `BANK_ACCOUNT` as the payment method type in the [getPaymentMethod](https://developer-docs.amazon.com/sp-api/reference/getpaymentmethods) request. Your Amazon Seller Wallet bank account identifier should match the `paymentMethodId` in the response. This field is required.

accountHolderName.description: The bank account holder's name (expected to be an Amazon customer). There is a 50 character limit.

bankAccountNumberFormat.description: The format in which the bank account number is provided for `THIRD_PARTY` transaction requests.

bankName.description: The name of the bank. This value is Amazon Seller Wallet for Amazon Seller Wallet accounts.

bankAccountOwnershipType.description: Type of ownership of the bank account. This value is `SELF` for Amazon Seller Wallet accounts.

routingNumber.description: Routing number for automated clearing house transfers for `THIRD_PARTY` transaction requests. This value is nine consecutive zeros for Amazon Seller Wallet accounts.

bankNumberFormat.description: The bank number format or routing number type for `THIRD_PARTY` transaction requests.

accountCountryCode.description: The two-digit country code in ISO 3166 format.

accountCurrency.description: Bank account currency code in ISO 4217 format.

bankAccountNumberTail.description: The last 3 digit of the bank account number. This value is three consecutive zeros for Amazon Seller Wallet accounts.

bankAccountHolderStatus.description: The compliance status of the bank account holder.

ScheduleTransferType.description: The type of schedule the transfer is on. Schedules based on time patterns use EventBridge.

x-docgen-enum-table-extension.description: The schedule is based on time patterns using EventBridge. Supports recurring patterns (daily, weekly, biweekly, monthly) and one-time events.

ScheduleExpressionType.description: The type of scheduled transfer expression.

x-docgen-enum-table-extension.description: The scheduled transfer is a recurring event.
The scheduled transfer is a one-time event.

TransferSchedule.description: Transfer schedule details and related historical details.

transferScheduleId.description: The unique identifier provided by Amazon to the scheduled transfer.

transactionSourceAccount.description: Details of the source bank account in the scheduled transfer.

transactionDestinationAccount.description: Details of the destination bank account in the scheduled transfer. Here `bankAccountCountryCode` is a required field.

transferScheduleStatus.description: The type of transfer schedule. This information can be modified when you update a transfer schedule.

transferScheduleInformation.description: The fields required for the scheduled transfer. This information can be modified when you update a transfer schedule.

paymentPreference.description: The payment preference of the scheduled transfer. This information can be modified when you update a transfer schedule.

transferScheduleFailures.description: A list of transfer schedule failures.

BankAccountNumberFormat.description: The format of the bank account number.

x-docgen-enum-table-extension.description: International bank account number.
Basic bank account number for domestic bank accounts.

BankNumberFormat.description: The format of the bank number. Also known as the routing number type.

x-docgen-enum-table-extension.description: Business Identifier Code. In ISO 9362 format.
The bank number has a special format specific to the country code provided, such as ABA routing number.

TransferScheduleStatus.description: The schedule status of the transfer.

x-docgen-enum-table-extension.description: The transfer schedule is enabled.
The transfer schedule is disabled.
The transfer has expired and is no longer scheduled.
The transfer was scheduled but has been deleted.

ErrorList.description: A list of error responses returned when a request is unsuccessful.

TransferScheduleRequest.description: Request body to initiate a scheduled transfer from a Seller Wallet bank account to another customer-defined bank account.

sourceAccountId.description: The unique identifier of the source Amazon Seller Wallet bank account from which money is debited.

sourceCurrencyCode.description: The three-letter currency code of the source payment method country, in ISO 4217 format.

destinationAccountId.description: The unique identifier of the destination bank account where the money is deposited.

destinationTransactionInstrument.description: Details of the destination bank account in the transaction request.

transactionType.description: The type of the scheduled transaction.

transferScheduleInformation.description: The configuration of the scheduled transfer.

paymentPreference.description: The payment preference of the scheduled transfer.

transferScheduleStatus.description: The type of transaction schedule. This field is required when you update a transfer schedule.

Error.description: Error response returned when the request is unsuccessful.

code.description: An error code that identifies the type of error that occurred.

message.description: A message that describes the error condition.

details.description: Additional details that can help the caller understand or fix the issue.

BankAccountHolderStatus.description: The status of the Amazon Seller Wallet account holder.

x-docgen-enum-table-extension.description: The account holder is Active.
The account holder is inactive and cannot make transactions.
The account holder is currently under review.
The account holder KYC (Know Your Customer) verification has failed.

TransferScheduleInformation.description: Mandatory information for initiating a schedule transfer.

scheduleStartDate.description: The start date of the scheduled transfer.

scheduleEndDate.description: The end date of the scheduled transfer.

scheduleExpression.description: How often the scheduled transfer repeats.

BankAccountOwnershipType.description: The destination bank account's ownership type.

x-docgen-enum-table-extension.description: The account is not officially owned by the Payment Service User who is viewing the account and initiating the transaction.
The account is officially owned by the Payment Service User who is viewing the account and initiating the transaction.
The scheduled transfer is a percentage of the account total.
The scheduled transfer is a specific amount.

PaymentPreference.description: The type of payment preference in which the transfer is being scheduled.

paymentPreferencePaymentType.description: The preferred payment type for the scheduled transaction. Can be `PERCENTAGE` or `AMOUNT`.

value.description: The value of the payment preference.
